description: This file defines a MySQL repository module for handling persistence of various 'Holistic Persona' related data via asynchronous functions. It includes functions for upserting and retrieving recommendations, comparison data, paths multiverse, plan milestones, and profile scoring, all linked to specific user, persona, or build identifiers.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded(v)
methods.description: Utility function to parse JSON strings or return objects/values as-is if already parsed or null.

methods.name: createRecommendationsCompare({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, leftRoleId, rightRoleId, comparison })
getLatestPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
getLatestPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
getLatestProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
getLatestRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
upsertPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, paths })
upsertPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, goal, timeframeWeeks, focus = null, milestones })
upsertProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, scoring })
upsertRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, inferredTags = [], roles })
